input.question: Which courses have no enrollments at all?

payload.question: Which courses have no enrollments at all?

output.sql:
SELECT c.id AS course_id, c.name AS course_name, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrollments_count
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON e.course_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name
HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) = 0
ORDER BY c.name;

payload.sql:
SELECT c.id AS course_id, c.name AS course_name, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrollments_count
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON e.course_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name
HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) = 0
ORDER BY c.name;
